name: securable-claude-plugin
description: A Claude Code plugin offering secure code generation, securability analysis, and PRD enhancement through the FIASSE/SSEM framework. Scores nine engineering attributes across three pillars (Maintainability, Trustworthiness, Reliability) and maps requirements to OWASP ASVS controls.

skills.name: securability-engineering-review
skills.description: Analyze code for securable qualities using the FIASSE/SSEM framework. Scores nine attributes across three pillars (Maintainability, Trustworthiness, Reliability) on a 0–10 scale.

skills.name: securability-engineering
skills.description: Wrap code generation with FIASSE/SSEM constraints so that output is engineered to be inherently securable by default.

skills.name: prd-securability-enhancement
skills.description: Enhance product requirement documents with ASVS level selection, feature-level ASVS requirement mapping, SSEM implementation annotations, and FIASSE tenet coverage.

commands.name: securability-review
commands.description: Run a full SSEM securability assessment on code

commands.name: secure-generate
commands.description: Generate code with FIASSE/SSEM constraints applied

commands.name: prd-securability-enhance
commands.description: Enhance PRD features with ASVS + FIASSE/SSEM requirements

commands.name: fiasse-lookup
commands.description: Look up FIASSE/SSEM reference material by topic

data.name: FIASSE RFC Reference
data.description: 35 structured FIASSE section files (S2.x–S8.x) sourced from the FIASSE RFC with YAML frontmatter for task matching.

data.name: OWASP ASVS 5.0 Reference
data.description: 80 structured ASVS 5.0 section files (V1–V17) sourced from the OWASP Agent Skills Project with YAML frontmatter for requirement mapping.

examples.name: PRD Enhancement
examples.description: Before/after example of PRD securability enhancement

ssem.description: Securable Software Engineering Model — nine attributes across three pillars
